title: BIM Modeller
description:
Job Summary

Plan, manage, and maintain BIM data to ensure compliance with project requirements and standards, coordinating across disciplines to resolve design clashes and deliver accurate, up-to-date documentation throughout project lifecycles.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the planning and management of BIM data to meet project specifications and quality standards
  • Develop and maintain project template files to ensure consistent application of BIM standards
  • Collaborate with engineers and other disciplines to identify and resolve design clashes effectively
  • Prepare and issue transmittals for drawings to sub-contractors, ensuring timely and accurate submissions
  • Manage revision control by superseding and updating drawing statuses to reflect current project information
  • Compile comprehensive as-built drawings upon project completion to document final construction details
  • Coordinate architectural, structural, and M&E drawings to support integrated project delivery
  • Produce detailed working drawings with accurate documentation to facilitate construction processes
  • Perform additional duties as assigned to support project and team objectives

Required competencies and certifications

  • BIM certification from BCA or a recognized training institute
  • Proficiency in Autodesk Revit for architectural, civil, and structural modeling

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience with BIM software and modeling techniques including Navisworks, AutoCAD, BENTLEY BIM, and Civil 3D Design
  • Strong knowledge of architectural, civil, and structural engineering design and construction principles
  • Demonstrated teamwork and a proactive attitude with a willingness to learn and take responsibility
  • Effective follow-up skills to ensure task completion and project progress

postedCompany.description:
Weima Builders Pte Ltd was established in year 2017 by a group of veterans. With a wide range of experience in the field of Construction for many years, our company is engaged in the business of Building Construction services and we are committed to deliver high quality services to our customers.

We are registered with Building and Construction Authority as their registered contractors for CW01 General Building with a grading of A1 & General Builder Class 1.

We are specializing in Building Construction services, such as design, management and construction services, civil engineering, foundations, electrical and mechanical, infrastructure maintenance and operation, interiors refurbishments and fit out services to meet our customer’s requirements.
postedCompany.name: WEIMA BUILDERS PTE. LTD.
